name: CSA Cloud Controls Matrix (CAIQ)
description: The Consensus Assessments Initiative Questionnaire (CAIQ) v4 provides a set of Yes/No questions for cloud consumers and auditors to assess cloud providers across 17 control domains aligned with the Cloud Controls Matrix (CCM).

categories.name: Audit & Assurance
categories.description: Controls related to audit planning, independent assessments, and compliance verification.

controls.name: Audit and Assurance Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Are policies and procedures for planning, conducting, and reporting audit activities established and maintained?

requirements.description: Establish and maintain audit policies defining scope, frequency, and responsibilities.
requirements.guidance: Review audit charter, policies, and procedures. Verify annual review cycle.

requirements.description: Define audit methodology aligned with industry standards (e.g., ISO 19011).
requirements.guidance: Examine audit methodology documentation and auditor qualifications.

controls.name: Independent Assessments
controls.description: Are independent reviews and assessments performed at least annually to ensure compliance with security policies?

requirements.description: Conduct independent third-party assessments at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Review SOC 2 reports, ISO certifications, or penetration test reports.

requirements.description: Address findings from independent assessments through remediation plans.
requirements.guidance: Examine remediation tracking and closure evidence.

controls.name: Risk-Based Planning
controls.description: Is audit planning based on risk assessment results and organizational priorities?

requirements.description: Develop audit plans based on risk assessment outputs.
requirements.guidance: Review risk-based audit planning documentation.

categories.name: Application & Interface Security
categories.description: Controls for securing applications and APIs throughout the development lifecycle.

controls.name: Application Security Policy
controls.description: Are policies and procedures established for application security throughout the development lifecycle?

requirements.description: Establish secure software development lifecycle (SSDLC) policies.
requirements.guidance: Review SDLC documentation and security integration points.

requirements.description: Define security requirements for all application development.
requirements.guidance: Examine security requirements templates and checklists.

controls.name: Application Security Testing
controls.description: Is security testing performed during development and before deployment?

requirements.description: Perform static application security testing (SAST) during development.
requirements.guidance: Review SAST tool configurations and scan results.

requirements.description: Perform dynamic application security testing (DAST) before deployment.
requirements.guidance: Examine DAST reports and remediation tracking.

requirements.description: Conduct penetration testing on applications at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Review penetration test reports and findings remediation.

controls.name: API Security
controls.description: Are APIs designed and managed with security controls including authentication and rate limiting?

requirements.description: Implement authentication and authorization for all API endpoints.
requirements.guidance: Review API gateway configurations and authentication mechanisms.

requirements.description: Implement rate limiting and throttling to prevent abuse.
requirements.guidance: Examine rate limiting policies and monitoring.

controls.name: Secure Development
controls.description: Is secure coding training provided to developers and are secure coding standards enforced?

requirements.description: Provide secure coding training to all developers annually.
requirements.guidance: Review training records and completion rates.

requirements.description: Enforce secure coding standards through code review processes.
requirements.guidance: Examine code review checklists and enforcement mechanisms.

categories.name: Business Continuity Management & Operational Resilience
categories.description: Controls for ensuring business continuity and operational resilience during disruptions.

controls.name: Business Continuity Policy
controls.description: Are business continuity and disaster recovery policies established and maintained?

requirements.description: Establish business continuity management policies aligned with ISO 22301.
requirements.guidance: Review BCM policy documentation and scope.

requirements.description: Define roles and responsibilities for business continuity.
requirements.guidance: Examine organizational structure and RACI matrices.

controls.name: Business Impact Analysis
controls.description: Is a business impact analysis performed to identify critical business processes?

requirements.description: Conduct business impact analysis (BIA) at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Review BIA documentation and critical process identification.

requirements.description: Define recovery time objectives (RTO) and recovery point objectives (RPO).
requirements.guidance: Examine RTO/RPO definitions and justifications.

controls.name: Disaster Recovery Planning
controls.description: Are disaster recovery plans developed, documented, and tested?

requirements.description: Develop and maintain disaster recovery plans for critical systems.
requirements.guidance: Review DR plan documentation and update history.

requirements.description: Test disaster recovery plans at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Examine DR test results and lessons learned.

controls.name: Backup and Recovery
controls.description: Are backup and recovery procedures implemented and tested regularly?

requirements.description: Implement automated backup procedures for critical data.
requirements.guidance: Review backup configurations and schedules.

requirements.description: Test backup restoration procedures quarterly.
requirements.guidance: Examine restoration test results and success rates.

categories.name: Change Control & Configuration Management
categories.description: Controls for managing changes and configurations in a controlled manner.

controls.name: Change Management Policy
controls.description: Are change management policies and procedures established and followed?

requirements.description: Establish change management policies aligned with ITIL practices.
requirements.guidance: Review change management policy documentation.

requirements.description: Define change classification and approval requirements.
requirements.guidance: Examine change classification matrix and approval workflows.

controls.name: Change Testing
controls.description: Are changes tested in non-production environments before deployment?

requirements.description: Test all changes in staging/test environments before production.
requirements.guidance: Review test environment configurations and deployment gates.

requirements.description: Document test results and approval for production deployment.
requirements.guidance: Examine change records and test evidence.

controls.name: Configuration Management
controls.description: Are system configurations managed and baselined?

requirements.description: Establish configuration baselines for all systems.
requirements.guidance: Review configuration baseline documentation.

requirements.description: Monitor for configuration drift and unauthorized changes.
requirements.guidance: Examine configuration monitoring tools and alerting.

categories.name: Cryptography, Encryption & Key Management
categories.description: Controls for cryptographic protections and key management.

controls.name: Encryption Policy
controls.description: Are encryption policies established for data at rest and in transit?

requirements.description: Establish encryption policies requiring strong algorithms (AES-256, RSA-2048+).
requirements.guidance: Review encryption policy and approved algorithm list.

requirements.description: Encrypt all data at rest using approved encryption methods.
requirements.guidance: Examine encryption configurations for storage systems.

requirements.description: Encrypt all data in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.
requirements.guidance: Review TLS configurations and certificate management.

controls.name: Key Management
controls.description: Are cryptographic keys managed securely throughout their lifecycle?

requirements.description: Implement key management procedures covering generation, storage, rotation, and destruction.
requirements.guidance: Review key management policy and procedures.

requirements.description: Use hardware security modules (HSMs) or equivalent for key protection.
requirements.guidance: Examine HSM configurations or cloud KMS usage.

requirements.description: Rotate encryption keys according to defined schedules.
requirements.guidance: Review key rotation logs and schedules.

controls.name: Certificate Management
controls.description: Are digital certificates managed properly including expiration monitoring?

requirements.description: Monitor certificate expiration and renew before expiry.
requirements.guidance: Review certificate inventory and monitoring tools.

categories.name: Datacenter Security
categories.description: Controls for physical security of data center facilities.

controls.name: Physical Access Control
controls.description: Are physical access controls implemented for data center facilities?

requirements.description: Implement multi-factor authentication for data center access.
requirements.guidance: Review physical access control systems and logs.

requirements.description: Maintain visitor logs and escort procedures.
requirements.guidance: Examine visitor management procedures and logs.

controls.name: Environmental Controls
controls.description: Are environmental controls implemented to protect data center equipment?

requirements.description: Implement fire detection and suppression systems.
requirements.guidance: Review fire safety certifications and testing records.

requirements.description: Maintain temperature and humidity controls.
requirements.guidance: Examine environmental monitoring systems and alerts.

controls.name: Power and Utilities
controls.description: Are redundant power and utilities provided for critical systems?

requirements.description: Implement uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems.
requirements.guidance: Review UPS configurations and testing records.

requirements.description: Maintain backup generator capabilities.
requirements.guidance: Examine generator testing and fuel management.

categories.name: Data Security & Privacy Lifecycle Management
categories.description: Controls for protecting data throughout its lifecycle and ensuring privacy compliance.

controls.name: Data Classification
controls.description: Is data classified according to sensitivity and business impact?

requirements.description: Establish data classification scheme (public, internal, confidential, restricted).
requirements.guidance: Review data classification policy and examples.

requirements.description: Label and handle data according to classification.
requirements.guidance: Examine data labeling mechanisms and handling procedures.

controls.name: Data Inventory
controls.description: Is a data inventory maintained identifying location and ownership?

requirements.description: Maintain data inventory including data types, locations, and owners.
requirements.guidance: Review data inventory documentation and update process.

controls.name: Data Retention and Disposal
controls.description: Are data retention and secure disposal procedures implemented?

requirements.description: Define data retention periods based on legal and business requirements.
requirements.guidance: Review retention schedule and legal basis documentation.

requirements.description: Securely dispose of data using approved methods (NIST 800-88).
requirements.guidance: Examine disposal procedures and certificates of destruction.

controls.name: Privacy Policy
controls.description: Are privacy policies established and communicated to data subjects?

requirements.description: Publish privacy notice compliant with applicable regulations (GDPR, CCPA).
requirements.guidance: Review privacy notice and regulatory compliance mapping.

requirements.description: Implement data subject rights procedures (access, deletion, portability).
requirements.guidance: Examine DSAR handling procedures and response times.

controls.name: Data Localization
controls.description: Is data storage location controlled according to regulatory requirements?

requirements.description: Document data storage locations and jurisdictions.
requirements.guidance: Review data residency documentation and controls.

categories.name: Governance, Risk and Compliance
categories.description: Controls for governance, risk management, and compliance oversight.

controls.name: Information Security Policy
controls.description: Is an information security policy established, approved, and communicated?

requirements.description: Establish information security policy approved by executive management.
requirements.guidance: Review security policy approval and communication evidence.

requirements.description: Review and update security policy at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Examine policy review history and version control.

controls.name: Risk Assessment
controls.description: Are risk assessments performed regularly to identify and evaluate risks?

requirements.description: Conduct risk assessments at least annually using documented methodology.
requirements.guidance: Review risk assessment reports and methodology.

requirements.description: Maintain risk register with treatment plans.
requirements.guidance: Examine risk register and treatment status.

controls.name: Regulatory Compliance
controls.description: Are applicable regulatory requirements identified and compliance maintained?

requirements.description: Identify applicable legal and regulatory requirements.
requirements.guidance: Review regulatory inventory and compliance mapping.

requirements.description: Monitor regulatory changes and update controls accordingly.
requirements.guidance: Examine regulatory monitoring process and updates.

controls.name: Third-Party Risk Management
controls.description: Are third-party vendors assessed and monitored for security risks?

requirements.description: Perform security assessments of third-party vendors before engagement.
requirements.guidance: Review vendor assessment questionnaires and results.

requirements.description: Monitor third-party vendor security posture on ongoing basis.
requirements.guidance: Examine vendor monitoring procedures and reassessment schedules.

categories.name: Human Resources Security
categories.description: Controls for security aspects of human resources management.

controls.name: Background Screening
controls.description: Are background checks performed for employees and contractors?

requirements.description: Perform background checks on all employees before hire.
requirements.guidance: Review background check policy and completion records.

requirements.description: Extend background check requirements to contractors with system access.
requirements.guidance: Examine contractor screening procedures.

controls.name: Security Awareness Training
controls.description: Is security awareness training provided to all personnel?

requirements.description: Provide security awareness training during onboarding.
requirements.guidance: Review onboarding training materials and completion tracking.

requirements.description: Conduct annual security awareness refresher training.
requirements.guidance: Examine annual training completion rates and content.

requirements.description: Include phishing awareness and social engineering training.
requirements.guidance: Review phishing simulation results and training.

controls.name: Termination Procedures
controls.description: Are access termination procedures implemented for departing personnel?

requirements.description: Revoke access within 24 hours of termination.
requirements.guidance: Review termination checklists and access removal logs.

requirements.description: Collect company assets including badges and devices.
requirements.guidance: Examine asset return procedures and tracking.

categories.name: Identity & Access Management
categories.description: Controls for managing identities and access to systems and data.

controls.name: Identity Management Policy
controls.description: Are identity and access management policies established?

requirements.description: Establish IAM policies covering identity lifecycle management.
requirements.guidance: Review IAM policy documentation.

requirements.description: Implement unique identifiers for all users.
requirements.guidance: Examine identity management system configurations.

controls.name: Authentication
controls.description: Is multi-factor authentication implemented for system access?

requirements.description: Require multi-factor authentication for all administrative access.
requirements.guidance: Review MFA configurations and enforcement.

requirements.description: Implement strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
requirements.guidance: Examine password policy settings and enforcement.

controls.name: Authorization
controls.description: Is access based on least privilege and role-based access control?

requirements.description: Implement role-based access control (RBAC).
requirements.guidance: Review role definitions and access mappings.

requirements.description: Enforce least privilege principle for all access grants.
requirements.guidance: Examine access provisioning procedures.

controls.name: Access Reviews
controls.description: Are access rights reviewed periodically?

requirements.description: Conduct access reviews at least quarterly for privileged accounts.
requirements.guidance: Review access review schedules and completion.

requirements.description: Conduct access reviews at least annually for all accounts.
requirements.guidance: Examine access recertification records.

controls.name: Privileged Access Management
controls.description: Are privileged accounts managed with enhanced controls?

requirements.description: Implement privileged access management (PAM) solution.
requirements.guidance: Review PAM tool configurations and session recording.

requirements.description: Monitor and log all privileged access activities.
requirements.guidance: Examine privileged access logs and alerting.

categories.name: Interoperability & Portability
categories.description: Controls for ensuring data interoperability and portability.

controls.name: Data Portability
controls.description: Are data portability mechanisms provided to customers?

requirements.description: Provide data export capabilities in standard formats.
requirements.guidance: Review data export functionality and formats supported.

requirements.description: Document data portability procedures and timelines.
requirements.guidance: Examine data portability documentation.

controls.name: API Standards
controls.description: Are APIs designed using industry standards for interoperability?

requirements.description: Use industry-standard API specifications (REST, OpenAPI).
requirements.guidance: Review API documentation and standards compliance.

categories.name: Infrastructure & Virtualization Security
categories.description: Controls for securing infrastructure and virtualized environments.

controls.name: Network Security
controls.description: Are network security controls implemented including segmentation and monitoring?

requirements.description: Implement network segmentation using firewalls and VLANs.
requirements.guidance: Review network architecture diagrams and firewall rules.

requirements.description: Deploy intrusion detection/prevention systems (IDS/IPS).
requirements.guidance: Examine IDS/IPS configurations and alert handling.

controls.name: Hypervisor Security
controls.description: Are hypervisor and virtualization platforms secured?

requirements.description: Harden hypervisor configurations according to vendor guidelines.
requirements.guidance: Review hypervisor hardening documentation.

requirements.description: Isolate tenant workloads using hypervisor security features.
requirements.guidance: Examine tenant isolation configurations.

controls.name: Container Security
controls.description: Are container environments secured throughout the lifecycle?

requirements.description: Scan container images for vulnerabilities before deployment.
requirements.guidance: Review container scanning tools and policies.

requirements.description: Implement runtime container security monitoring.
requirements.guidance: Examine container runtime security configurations.

controls.name: Endpoint Security
controls.description: Are endpoint security controls deployed on all systems?

requirements.description: Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions.
requirements.guidance: Review EDR deployment coverage and configurations.

requirements.description: Maintain anti-malware protection with current signatures.
requirements.guidance: Examine anti-malware configurations and update status.

categories.name: Logging & Monitoring
categories.description: Controls for logging, monitoring, and security event management.

controls.name: Logging Policy
controls.description: Are logging policies established defining what events to capture?

requirements.description: Establish logging policy defining required log sources and retention.
requirements.guidance: Review logging policy and standards.

requirements.description: Log security-relevant events including authentication, authorization, and system changes.
requirements.guidance: Examine log source inventory and configurations.

controls.name: Log Protection
controls.description: Are logs protected from unauthorized access and tampering?

requirements.description: Store logs in centralized, protected log management system.
requirements.guidance: Review SIEM/log management architecture.

requirements.description: Restrict access to logs to authorized personnel only.
requirements.guidance: Examine log access controls and audit trails.

controls.name: Security Monitoring
controls.description: Is continuous security monitoring implemented?

requirements.description: Implement 24x7 security monitoring capabilities.
requirements.guidance: Review SOC operations and coverage.

requirements.description: Define and monitor for security use cases and indicators of compromise.
requirements.guidance: Examine detection rules and alert thresholds.

controls.name: Log Retention
controls.description: Are logs retained according to policy and regulatory requirements?

requirements.description: Retain logs for minimum 12 months (or as required by regulation).
requirements.guidance: Review log retention configurations and compliance.

categories.name: Security Incident Management, E-Discovery & Cloud Forensics
categories.description: Controls for incident response, forensics, and e-discovery support.

controls.name: Incident Response Policy
controls.description: Are incident response policies and procedures established?

requirements.description: Establish incident response plan aligned with NIST 800-61.
requirements.guidance: Review incident response policy and procedures.

requirements.description: Define incident classification and escalation procedures.
requirements.guidance: Examine incident severity matrix and escalation paths.

controls.name: Incident Response Team
controls.description: Is an incident response team established with defined roles?

requirements.description: Establish incident response team with defined roles and responsibilities.
requirements.guidance: Review IRT charter and contact information.

requirements.description: Provide incident response training to team members.
requirements.guidance: Examine IRT training records and certifications.

controls.name: Incident Testing
controls.description: Are incident response procedures tested regularly?

requirements.description: Conduct incident response tabletop exercises at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Review tabletop exercise results and lessons learned.

controls.name: Forensic Capability
controls.description: Are forensic investigation capabilities maintained?

requirements.description: Maintain forensic investigation capabilities or contracts.
requirements.guidance: Review forensic tools and procedures or third-party agreements.

requirements.description: Preserve evidence according to forensic best practices.
requirements.guidance: Examine evidence handling procedures and chain of custody.

controls.name: Breach Notification
controls.description: Are breach notification procedures established and tested?

requirements.description: Establish breach notification procedures compliant with regulations.
requirements.guidance: Review breach notification playbooks and timelines.

categories.name: Supply Chain Management, Transparency & Accountability
categories.description: Controls for supply chain security and transparency.

controls.name: Supply Chain Policy
controls.description: Are supply chain security policies established?

requirements.description: Establish supply chain security policy and procedures.
requirements.guidance: Review supply chain security policy documentation.

controls.name: Supplier Assessment
controls.description: Are suppliers assessed for security risks?

requirements.description: Assess critical suppliers for security risks before engagement.
requirements.guidance: Review supplier security assessment procedures.

requirements.description: Include security requirements in supplier contracts.
requirements.guidance: Examine supplier contract security clauses.

controls.name: Service Transparency
controls.description: Is service information transparently communicated to customers?

requirements.description: Provide transparency reports or security documentation to customers.
requirements.guidance: Review customer-facing security documentation.

controls.name: Software Supply Chain
controls.description: Is software supply chain security implemented?

requirements.description: Maintain software bill of materials (SBOM) for applications.
requirements.guidance: Review SBOM generation and maintenance.

requirements.description: Scan dependencies for known vulnerabilities.
requirements.guidance: Examine dependency scanning tools and remediation.

categories.name: Threat & Vulnerability Management
categories.description: Controls for identifying and remediating threats and vulnerabilities.

controls.name: Vulnerability Management Policy
controls.description: Are vulnerability management policies and procedures established?

requirements.description: Establish vulnerability management policy defining scanning and remediation requirements.
requirements.guidance: Review vulnerability management policy documentation.

controls.name: Vulnerability Scanning
controls.description: Are vulnerability scans performed regularly?

requirements.description: Perform authenticated vulnerability scans at least weekly.
requirements.guidance: Review vulnerability scanning schedules and coverage.

requirements.description: Scan external-facing assets at least monthly.
requirements.guidance: Examine external vulnerability scan reports.

controls.name: Vulnerability Remediation
controls.description: Are vulnerabilities remediated within defined SLAs?

requirements.description: Define vulnerability remediation SLAs by severity (Critical: 7 days, High: 30 days).
requirements.guidance: Review remediation SLA definitions.

requirements.description: Track and report vulnerability remediation metrics.
requirements.guidance: Examine vulnerability metrics and aging reports.

controls.name: Patch Management
controls.description: Is patch management implemented for all systems?

requirements.description: Implement automated patch management where possible.
requirements.guidance: Review patch management tools and procedures.

requirements.description: Deploy critical patches within defined timeframes.
requirements.guidance: Examine patch deployment timelines and compliance.

controls.name: Threat Intelligence
controls.description: Is threat intelligence gathered and used for defense?

requirements.description: Subscribe to threat intelligence feeds relevant to the organization.
requirements.guidance: Review threat intelligence sources and integration.

requirements.description: Use threat intelligence to inform security monitoring.
requirements.guidance: Examine threat intelligence operationalization.

controls.name: Penetration Testing
controls.description: Are penetration tests performed regularly?

requirements.description: Conduct external penetration tests at least annually.
requirements.guidance: Review penetration test reports and findings.

requirements.description: Remediate penetration test findings according to severity.
requirements.guidance: Examine penetration test remediation tracking.
